message:
feat(status): propagate context usage metrics through status pipeline

Wires up context usage and token count extraction from agent output
through the entire status detection pipeline, enabling dashboards to
display real-time context window utilization.

Changes to internal/agent/patterns.go:
- extractFloat/extractInt now return the LAST match rather than first
- This handles agents that report multiple status updates in output,
  ensuring we use the most recent value rather than stale data

Changes to internal/coordinator/monitor.go:
- Populate AgentStatusResult.ContextUsage from agentStatus in GetAgentStatus

Changes to internal/status/unified.go:
- Add metric extraction block to Analyze(), Detect(), and DetectAllContext()
- Parse agent output using agent.Parser when agentType is known
- Populate ContextUsage and TokensUsed from parser results
- Skip parsing for unknown agent types (user panes)

This completes the pipeline: pane output → agent parser → unified status
→ coordinator monitor → dashboard display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,6 +61,7 @@ func (m *AgentMonitor) GetAgentStatus(paneID, agentType string) AgentStatusResul
 	result.Status = mapStatusToRobotState(agentStatus.State)
 	result.LastActivity = agentStatus.LastActive
 	result.Healthy = agentStatus.State != status.StateError
+	result.ContextUsage = agentStatus.ContextUsage
 
 	// Use activity monitor for velocity
 	classifier := m.activityMon.GetOrCreate(paneID)
